'''baranga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylohexoside|xylohexoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylohexoside|xylohexoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| baranga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bærængæth|bærængæth]] || [[word:bærængæj|bærængæj]] || [[word:bærængæsh|bærængæsh]] || [[word:bærængæ|bærængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bararangath|bararangath]] || [[word:bararangaj|bararangaj]] || [[word:bararangash|bararangash]] || [[word:bararanga|bararanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:barangath|barangath]] || [[word:barangaj|barangaj]] || [[word:barangash|barangash]] || [[word:baranga|baranga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:barafngath|barafngath]] || [[word:barafngaj|barafngaj]] || [[word:barafngash|barafngash]] || [[word:barafngaf|barafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:barangatha|barangatha]] || [[word:barangaja|barangaja]] || [[word:barangasha|barangasha]] || [[word:barangaka|barangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:barangath|barangath]] || [[word:barangaj|barangaj]] || [[word:barangash|barangash]] || [[word:baranga|baranga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:barangathal|barangathal]] || [[word:barangajal|barangajal]] || [[word:barangashal|barangashal]] || [[word:barangakal|barangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:barangathatha|barangathatha]] || [[word:barangajaja|barangajaja]] || [[word:barangashasha|barangashasha]] || [[word:barangaka|barangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:barangathan|barangathan]] || [[word:barangajan|barangajan]] || [[word:barangashan|barangashan]] || [[word:barangakan|barangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:barangathaoro|barangathaoro]] || [[word:barangajaoro|barangajaoro]] || [[word:barangashaoro|barangashaoro]] || [[word:barangakaoro|barangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
